posts.author: PP1
posts.community: IDFC First Bank Limited - First Bank Preference for Long Term Investors too?
posts.text: image 1091×795 111 KB Q1 FY27 provisional numbers are here. Deposits grew by 5.9% QoQ (26% annualized). CASA grew by 8.1% QoQ (36.5% annualized). There were fears that IDFC bank will find it hard to raise deposits post the recent fraud incident. Well, those fears have been dispelled by these strong numbers.
